{{Infobox character
| name = Emala
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Grand Oath Array]], [[script-circle|script-circles]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Rune Queen]], [[Monarch]], [[Sage]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Shatterspine Castle]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

''See also: [[Emala Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Emala was a [[Rune Queen]] and [[Sage]] who perished during the [[Dread War]]. During her [[life]], she commanded lesser [[Lords]] and [[Golds]] to assist in a siege. She is known for creating the [[Grand Oath Array]], a powerful tool that she once dismantled to establish a seal protecting [[Shatterspine Castle]]. It is believed she intended to return to the city, as her actions were meant to safeguard smaller [[scripts]] until her return. Currently, fragments of her [[Array]] remain within the city, and her magical techniques and [[madra]] are considered highly valuable for study.}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Once a [[Sage]], Emala eventually ascended to become the [[Monarch]] known as the [[Rune Queen]]. She wielded [[madra]] through a [[Grand Oath Array]] composed of runes derived from ancient script. During the [[Dread War]], Emala died and utilized her power to leave behind various script-circles and pieces of her array. In her final act, she broke apart one of these arrays to maintain a seal around [[Shatterspine Castle]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] was the [[Rune Queen]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] died in the [[Dread War]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] left pieces of her [[Grand Oath Array]] behind.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] is a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]]'s [[Grand Oath Array]] was based on runes derived from the ancient runes.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] died in the [[Dread War]] and broke apart one of her Arrays to maintain a seal around [[Shatterspine Castle]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] sealed the castle with the [[Grand Oath Array]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] was once a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] was a [[Monarch]] who left behind script-circles.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emala]] has [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|"Good, you found more of Emala’s madra than I expected.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
